rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCHUGH et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant St. Francisco Hotel Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is continued to September 25, 2013 pursuant to plaintiffs¿ C.C.P. 437c(h) request for a continuance, which is granted. Plaintiffs demonstrated that facts essential to justify opposition may exist but cannot now be presented. Opposition, if any, due by September 11, 2013 at 4:00p.m. Reply, if any, due by September 20, 2013 at 4:00p.m. If a hearing is requested to contest this continuance, it will be at 9:45a.m. on Tuesday July 30. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30p.m. on July 24 stating their intention to contest. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: FLOYD BILLBERRY VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.'s amended motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed May 30, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
